signin.title: Sign in to Multica
signin.description: Enter your email to get a login code

verify.title: Check your email
verify.description: We sent a verification code to {{email}}

cli.title: Authorize CLI
cli.description: Allow the CLI to access Multica as {{email}}

totp.title: Use your authenticator
totp.prompt_choose: How would you like to verify your identity?
totp.totp_prompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

errors.server_unreachable: Make sure the server is running.
errors.cli_auth_failed: Failed to authorize CLI. Please log in again.

desktop_handoff.opening_description: You should see a prompt to open the Multica desktop app. If nothing happens, click the button below.
